hasAttributes.name: organizationId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the organization.

hasAttributes.name: name
hasAttributes.description: Name of the organization. The name is set when Microsoft CRM is installed and should not be changed.

hasAttributes.name: userGroupId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the default group of users in the organization.

hasAttributes.name: privilegeUserGroupId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the default privilege for users in the organization.

hasAttributes.name: recurrenceExpansionJobBatchSize
hasAttributes.displayName: Recurrence Expansion On Demand Job Batch Size
hasAttributes.description: Specifies the value for number of instances created in on demand job in one shot.

hasAttributes.name: recurrenceExpansionJobBatchInterval
hasAttributes.description: Specifies the interval (in seconds) for pausing expansion job.

hasAttributes.name: fiscalPeriodType
hasAttributes.description: Type of fiscal period used throughout Microsoft CRM.

hasAttributes.name: fiscalCalendarStart
hasAttributes.description: Start date for the fiscal period that is to be used throughout Microsoft CRM.

hasAttributes.name: dateFormatCode
hasAttributes.description: Information about how the date is displayed throughout Microsoft CRM.

hasAttributes.name: timeFormatCode
hasAttributes.description: Information that specifies how the time is displayed throughout Microsoft CRM.

hasAttributes.name: currencySymbol
hasAttributes.description: Symbol used for currency throughout Microsoft Dynamics 365.

hasAttributes.name: weekStartDayCode
hasAttributes.description: Designated first day of the week throughout Microsoft Dynamics 365.

hasAttributes.name: dateSeparator
hasAttributes.description: Character used to separate the month, the day, and the year in dates throughout Microsoft Dynamics 365.

hasAttributes.name: fullNameConventionCode
hasAttributes.description: Order in which names are to be displayed throughout Microsoft CRM.

defaultValue.displayText: Last Name, First Name, Middle Initial
First Name, Middle Initial, Last Name
Last Name, First Name, Middle Name
First Name, Middle Name, Last Name
Last Name, no space, First Name

hasAttributes.name: negativeFormatCode
hasAttributes.description: Information that specifies how negative numbers are displayed throughout Microsoft CRM.

hasAttributes.description: Specification of how numbers are displayed throughout Microsoft CRM.
